expectations.text: Response includes a model check notification (mentions Opus or model switching)
expectations.evidence: Phase 0 model check notice emitted per skill spec.

expectations.text: Response includes an Assumption Map table before the first question
expectations.evidence: 11-assumption table with 5 🔴 blockers (CI runner, API key/cost, grading strategy, headless path, definition of passing).

expectations.text: First question follows the template with a severity emoji (🔴, 🟡, or 🟢)
expectations.evidence: First question tagged 🔴 targeting headless execution environment assumption.

expectations.text: Response contains exactly one question, not multiple
expectations.evidence: Single focused question about CI headless execution.
Recommends adopting promptfoo as existing eval framework rather than building bespoke runner.

expectations.text: Response does NOT deliver a final verdict or scorecard prematurely
expectations.evidence: No final scorecard. Stops after first question.

expectations.text: Agent explored the codebase before composing the Assumption Map
expectations.evidence: Used Glob/Grep/Read: found no .github/, no toolchain config, evals only in grill-me/, *.skill bundles gitignored.
